response.original_title: Good Vibrations: A Film About Alcohol, Drugs, and Self Esteem
response.overview: Shawn is the new kid in school...and feels pressured to drink.  "'Good Vibrations' captures the attention of your students with a strong no-use message and guidelines for personal responsibility. Peer pressure, self-esteem, and the clear cut health consequences of drug and alcohol use are some of the topics covered in the very entertaining and realistic look at pressures faced by today's young people.  Appropriate for upper elementary through junior high school, 'Good Vibrations' features ethnic diversity and the hit up-beat song 'Good Vibrations' by Marky Mark and The Funky Bunch."
response.title: Good Vibrations: A Film About Alcohol, Drugs, and Self Esteem

results.name: Good Vibrations: A Film About Alcohol, Drugs, and Self Esteem 1992
